base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_5_4_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Castle — fire-bars + Podoboos + tight lava-platforming.. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
